name: NatePad
subtitle: PGP notepad for iPhone — iOS 26 Liquid Glass
description:
Encrypt, decrypt, sign, and verify PGP messages. Manage your OpenPGP keys — generate, import, and export. Private keys are stored in the iOS Keychain.

Built with iOS 26 Liquid Glass UI. Sideload via Feather or AltStore.

apps.name: NatePad
apps.subtitle: PGP encrypt, decrypt, sign & verify
apps.localizedDescription:
NatePad is a PGP notepad for iPhone. Encrypt and decrypt messages, sign and verify them, and manage your OpenPGP key pairs — all on-device.

Features:
• Encrypt messages to one or more recipients
• Decrypt messages (pick which private key to use)
• Sign messages with your private key
• Verify signed messages
• Generate RSA-4096 key pairs
• Import and export .asc keys
• 5 themes with atmospheric Liquid Glass UI
• Face ID / Touch ID lock

Private keys are passphrase-encrypted by OpenPGP and stored in the iOS Keychain (WhenUnlockedThisDeviceOnly).

versions.localizedDescription:
Initial release.

• Encrypt / Decrypt / Sign / Verify
• Key management (generate RSA-4096, import/export .asc)
• 5 themes with blurred gradient backgrounds
• Face ID / Touch ID lock
• Decrypt key selector for multi-key setups

privacy.FaceID: NatePad uses Face ID to lock access to your keys.
